headline: Uber Eats Is No Longer Just a Food App. The Stock Is Reacting.
summary: Uber adds five retail partners to Uber Eats

headline: Best Buy introduces RGB LED TVs to stores nationwide, ushering new era of home theater
summary: MINNEAPOLIS, June 24, 2026--The most significant advancement in TV technology in more than a decade is now available at Best Buy stores nationwide. Through exclusive partnerships with Samsung, Sony, LG, TCL and Hisense, Best Buy is the only national retailer where customers can shop RGB LED TVs and see color and brightness never before possible, from anywhere in the room.

headline: Chip Selloff Deepens as AI Doubts Bleed Into a Second Session
summary: Semis took another beating Tuesday as the AI capex narrative wobbled, the dollar punched to a one-year high, and all eyes turn to Micron earnings after the close.
